corpus.transcript: When the Indian Cuckoo (kuyil) calls before dawn, the monsoon arrives in seven to ten days.

sentinel_recommendation.method: Pearson r + Welch t-test (KAALAM sentinel assessment)
sentinel_recommendation.dataset: eBird Indian Cuckoo first call (Wayanad) × IMD Kerala monsoon onset (2001-2024)
sentinel_recommendation.finding: Outcome timing shifted between early and recent years (Welch p < 0.001). A prediction held in living memory no longer matches the data. Stream: Cheenkanni Kaavu (Kaavu Sentinel). Awaiting human confirmation.

corpus.transcript: When the Pala tree (Bartaea longifolia) is in full flower, the first heavy rain comes within two to three weeks.

sentinel_recommendation.method: Pearson r + Welch t-test (KAALAM sentinel assessment)
sentinel_recommendation.dataset: Kaavu Sentinel phenology cam × IMD first heavy rain (2015-2024)
sentinel_recommendation.finding: Outcome timing shifted between early and recent years (Welch p < 0.001). A prediction held in living memory no longer matches the data. Stream: Pulpalli Sacred Grove (Kaavu Sentinel). Awaiting human confirmation.

corpus.transcript: The inner bark of Cheevakka is scraped, pounded with wild turmeric, and pasted on the chest for three nights when fever comes with chills.
When the Pala tree (Bartaea longifolia) is in full flower, the first heavy rain comes within two to three weeks.

sentinel_recommendation.method: Pearson r + Welch t-test (KAALAM sentinel assessment)
sentinel_recommendation.dataset: GBIF Pala occurrence × IMD first rain (2015-2024)
sentinel_recommendation.finding: Observed lag (mean 37.5 days) sits outside the 14-21 day claim (r = -0.59). Data gap — not proof the elder is wrong. Sparse bloom reports. Phenology cameras on the Kaavu Sentinel resolve true bloom onset. Stream: GBIF/occurrence fallback. Awaiting human confirmation.

sentinels.name: Kaavu Sentinel 01
sentinels.notes: ESP32 + INMP441 + LoRa — live USB demo unit at Meppadi grove.

sentinels.name: Cheenkanni Kaavu
sentinels.notes: Primary cuckoo monitoring grove. Solar panel cleaned monthly.

sentinels.name: BR Hills Kaavu
sentinels.notes: Battery trending low — field visit scheduled.

sentinels.name: Pala Grove Sentinel
sentinels.notes: Cuckoo call detected intermittently this week.
